finding_results.notes: Varied the Paris temptation across distinct material lures: domestic relief at line 133, Nina's practical sales pitch at line 137, economic freedom at line 155, and private control over space and money at line 285.
finding_results.summary: The repeated comfort bundle was broken into differentiated, concrete temptation beats without weakening the cost of refusal.
